## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (unit tests)
- [ ] `databricks bundle validate -t dev` passes (if bundle/resources changed)
- [ ] Notebook/pipeline logic changes were run against a workspace, or are covered by tests
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour or setup changed
